name: WebPurify
description: WebPurify — profanity filter and image/video moderation API with 20+ years in the space.

seo.title: WebPurify — Content Moderation API
seo.meta_description: WebPurify: WebPurify — profanity filter and image/video moderation API with 20+ years in the space.

when_to_use: Running live profanity filtering and content moderation via API
Moderating user text and images for e-commerce or social apps
Building customizable word lists for brand-specific filtering
Scaling text and image moderation for high-volume platforms

pros: 20+ year track record, very stable vendor
Profanity, image, and video moderation in one
cons: AI sophistication trails newer ML-first vendors
Context handling weaker than modern LLM tools
Per-call pricing adds up at high volume
review.verdict: Old-guard moderation vendor that still delivers; choose for stability, not for cutting-edge ML accuracy.
review.best_for: Teams wanting a single proven vendor for profanity, image, and video moderation.
review.not_for: Platforms needing state-of-the-art contextual ML or cheap high-volume classification.
